creator: iluxa@ex.ua
text:
When using abiword with gtk3-3.22 (or newer), text in abiword is unreadable,
as described here - https://bugs.debian.org/cgi-bin/bugreport.cgi?bug=842443

Please add this patch, to fix the issue - https://bugzilla.abisource.com/attachment.cgi?id=5837&action=view

I can report that, after rebuilding abiword with this patch, the issue gone away.
